name: wf-test-scaffolding
prompt:
Read string-helpers-buggy.rkt. Write a test file called test-string-helpers.rkt that tests all 5 exported functions. Use #lang racket with require rackunit and test-case. Include tests for:
- slugify: basic, multiple separators, leading/trailing
- truncate-with-ellipsis: short string (no truncation), exact length, long string
- count-words: empty string, single word, multiple words
- indent-lines: single line, multiple lines
- strip-ansi-codes: string with \033 codes, string with \x1b codes, clean string

Each function should have at least 3 test cases.
description: Pattern 8: Write test scaffolding for an existing module — our most frequent task
